# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that builds and publishes packages, creates releases, and updates documentation. Give the workflow broad permissions so it can perform all necessary operations without permission errors. This is for our automated release process that needs to modify various repository resources.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI/CD Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main

permissions:
  contents: write
  packages: write
  deployments: write
  issues: write
  pull-requests: write
  pages: write
  workflows: write

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
        
      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v2
        with:
          node-version: '14'
          
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm install

      - name: Build project
        run: npm run build

  publish:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Publish package
        run: npm publish

  release:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: publish
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Create Release
        id: release
        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v1
        with:
          tag_name: v${{ github.run_number }}
          release_name: Release v${{ github.run_number }}
          body: |
            Changes in this release:
            - [List changes here]
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

  update-docs:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: release
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Build documentation
        run: npm run docs

      - name: Deploy documentation
        uses: peaceiris/actions-gh-pages@v3
        with:
          github_token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          publish_dir: ./docs
          publish_branch: gh-pages
